sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87634" key="proka/rhnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προκάρηνος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n87634.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">head-foremost,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.632</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diod.</author> </bibl>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0163.tlg001:9:533" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.533</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0576.tlg001:341" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Musae.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">341</biblScope></bibl>, etc.</sense> </entryFree>
